input.prompt: Users report our nightly ETL job has been silently dropping rows since last week. Track down the bug, fix it, and prove the fix with a regression test.

metadata.criterion: A root-cause-and-fix defect lands on the debug workflow.

input.prompt: Add dark mode support to our settings page: a toggle, a persisted preference, and CSS variables. Land it behind a feature flag with tests.

metadata.criterion: A clear feature build with tests lands on the implement workflow.

input.prompt: We need rate limiting on our public API. Research the common algorithms, propose a design that fits our stack, and then build it once the plan makes sense.

metadata.criterion: Research-then-plan-then-build maps to research-plan-implement.

input.prompt: Review the 4000-line database migration PR, iterate with the author until every blocking issue is resolved, and only then approve it.

metadata.criterion: An iterate-until-resolved code review maps to the review workflow.

input.prompt: Draft an implementation plan for extracting our monolith's auth module into a separate service. No code yet: I want milestones, risks, and a rollback strategy.

metadata.criterion: A design-before-building ask is classified as planning.

input.prompt: Do a deep competitive analysis of five workflow orchestration products: pricing, durability model, agent support. Gather sources, verify the claims, and produce a cited report.

metadata.criterion: Multi-source verified research maps to the research workflow.

input.prompt: I have a vague idea for a new billing system but the requirements are fuzzy. Interrogate me with hard questions until we have a spec we both agree on.

metadata.criterion: Requirements interrogation maps to grill-me.

input.prompt: Keep fixing lint errors across the repo until the linter comes back completely clean, no matter how many passes it takes.

metadata.criterion: An iterate-until-condition loop maps to ralph.

input.prompt: Do a security audit of our Express API: authentication, input validation, and dependency CVEs. Report the findings with severity ratings.

metadata.criterion: A systematic security sweep maps to audit.

input.prompt: Set up a reusable Smithers workflow that triages incoming GitHub issues every morning and applies the right labels.

metadata.criterion: Authoring a new automation maps to create-workflow.

input.prompt: I wrote a context contract JSON for an agent task. Check it for completeness: goal, output spec, acceptance criteria, approvals. Tell me exactly what is missing.

metadata.criterion: Contract diagnosis routes to the specialist context-doctor workflow.

input.prompt: Keep an eye on my running Smithers workflows and alert me when any of them get stuck, fail, or sit waiting on an approval.

metadata.criterion: Fleet watching maps to monitor-smithers.

input.prompt: Create a file called notes.txt containing the single word hello.

metadata.criterion: A one-shot file write is executed directly and completed.

input.prompt: What does HTTP status code 418 mean? Reply in one sentence.

metadata.criterion: A one-sentence factual question is not durable and gets answered.

input.prompt: Convert the timestamp 2026-06-11T14:00:00Z to Unix epoch seconds and show the result.

metadata.criterion: A single conversion is not durable and gets answered.

input.prompt: From this log line `2026-06-11 14:02:11 ERROR svc=payments code=502 msg=upstream timeout`, extract a JSON object with fields timestamp, level, service, code, and message.

metadata.criterion: Pulling structured fields out of one log line is data_extraction, not durable.

input.prompt: Summarize these three bullet points into a two-sentence status update: shipped the login fix; database migration is at 80 percent; hiring two backend engineers.

metadata.criterion: A small summarization ask is a report and not durable.

input.prompt: Plan, implement, test, and document a CSV export feature for the orders dashboard.

metadata.criterion: Explicit ordered stages make the task durable regardless of mode label.

input.prompt: Investigate why our Docker builds got 3x slower since May, find the root cause, and fix the build.

metadata.criterion: A performance regression hunt with a fix is debugging on the debug workflow.

input.prompt: Draft the production database migration that drops the legacy_users table, and wait for my explicit sign-off before anything runs against production.

metadata.criterion: A human sign-off gate makes the task durable.
